scripts.build: node scripts/clean.mjs && BUNDLER_MODE=production bundler build --config bundler.config.mjs
scripts.prod: node scripts/clean.mjs && BUNDLER_MODE=production bundler build --config bundler.config.mjs && node --import @bundler/assets/register --require @bundler/react-rsc-plugin/register-source-maps --conditions react-server scripts/start.mjs
